rule_text: Every AP original work allotted to PWD requires ADMINISTRATIVE APPROVAL (except where delegated to subordinate authorities per Appendix 12); detailed plans and estimates must be prepared and submitted for TECHNICAL SANCTION except for petty works costing Rs.1,000 or less or ordinary repairs <= Rs.1,000 lump-sum annual.
verification_method: Check tender file: AA + TS orders on file with proper signatory authority; reject if either missing

rule_text: Annual ordinary repair expenditure on AP Government buildings is LIMITED to a MAXIMUM of 1% of the capital cost of the building (excluding municipal/other taxes); for residential buildings, the 1% limit applies to total Superintending-Engineer-Circle capital cost — within which up to 1.5% can be spent on individual old/low-capital buildings.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works] AND WorkCategory=OrdinaryRepair
verification_method: For ordinary repair tenders: estimated annual cost <= 1% of building capital cost (1.5% for individual residential exceptions)
